creator: Gymhealthu
source_text:
High Protein Chinese Egg Drop Soup! 🤤🍜💪🏽

15 Minutes, ONLY 180 Calories per serve, with 14g of Protein! Delicious and so easy to make!🔥

Check bio for cookbook with meals like this! 🍜🔥🔥

Serves 3: 🍜🍜🍜

Calories & Macros 📊
Per Serve: 180 calories 
14g P | 11g C | 6.5g F

Ingredients👇🏽
- 4 eggs
- 1 tbsp water
- 750ml chicken stock
- 500ml chicken bone broth (extra collagen protein - sub with chicken stock)
- Salt and white pepper to taste 
- 2 tbsp green onion (whites parts)
- 1/4 cup sweet corn (optional)
- 2 tbsp cornstarch + water (mix into a slurry before adding)
- 1 tbsp sesame oil 
- Green onion green parts (to garnish)

Follow @Gymhealthu for more 🔥  Follow @Gymhealthu for more 🔥

🏷️ #highprotein #eggdropsoup
#lowcalorie #easyrecipe #quickrecipe
Credit: @panaceapalm

notes: Agent-labeled from the frozen Instagram description before viewing parser output.
The caption supplies a title, yield, and ingredients but no preparation instructions.
Accepted exactly with the existing creator-independent parser; no parser change was needed.
